title: Harder Than Wolves
description: An add-on for Better Than Wolves Legacy Unofficial aimed at increasing the difficulty of the Vanilla game by gating important tools and the Nether portal behind features of BTW and entirely new features. Made for older versions of the game
body:
### Now on Station API Alpha 5.2!

# Structured progression
![Nether portal with the full structural requirement. It has four corner blocks of chiseled obsidian, active engraved obsidian at both entry sides, and a base of obsidian glass with lava below](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7wgXgQch/images/aa0088f79fd67977433b1f8131bfa34cd1f72da2_350.webp)
The mod has been structured into multiple ages of technology, each introducing a new challenge to overcome. The idea is to make the process of reaching the Nether a lot more involved by expanding upon features of the Vanilla game which have a lot of unused potential. The start of the game is completely unchanged, punching a tree still is the first logical step. The changes have an impact after wooden tools are crafted. The current ages are as follows: Wood -> Stone -> Iron -> Gold -> Lapis -> Diamond -> Nether

# Changes to the Vanilla game
## Harder tool recipes
Stone tools require hemp fibers which involves farming hemp. This means wooden tools stay relevant for a while and it is sensible to quickly build up a big hemp farm.

Iron tools require moulding on top of hemp fibers. Better Than Wolves sees a lot of its progression becoming relevant here. A saw and a windmill for the saw are required in order to produce moulding. Leather tanning needs to be done as well.

Gold tools have a varying amount of exotic ingredients. One gold tool unlocks the next which then again unlocks more of them until all have been crafted.

Diamond tools are made in a mystical infuser and require diamond ingots instead of just diamonds. They can also be recycled in the crucible.

## Harder ore processing
Iron and gold ore need to be milled in a mill stone. Smelting them requires a metal forge multi-block, see more in the machines category below. Both can also be sifted with a rotary sieve to get slightly improved ore efficiency. Gold requires sifting in order to be smelted.

## Specialized golden tools
Each golden tool and the gold sword have a special purpose. They are needed to obtain exotic ingredients for higher tier materials. They can be upgraded with a diamond ingot for higher durability variants.

# New machines
![A machine room with various machines from the mod and additional structures to make their handling easier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7wgXgQch/images/342b48cfca82c3bd4c0561a97e6d202caac174d4_350.webp)
## Metal forge
Capable of smelting iron, gold, and some other resources. All valid input blocks are falling blocks which means larger batches of smelting can be semi-automated. Built with the metal forge as a base and four stone brick blocks surrounding an air block above the main block. A fire is needed from below which can be created with a fire pile, an early game option for long lasting fire which needs to be reloaded with wooden planks and can be lit with a torch. Stoked fire speeds up the smelting process.

## Rotary sieve
Takes in resources from the top and shoots them out at the sides as sifted outputs. Requires a turntable below to spin it up and make it sift. All ingredients are falling blocks so automation is possible.

## Monster siphon
Used for siphoning the energy from mob spawners and charging mystical rocks with it. This machine is very important for going past the gold age and powering the mystical infuser.

## Mystical infuser
A hybrid of a crafting table and a magic machine, this workstation fuses machines and tools with the energy from mystical rocks. Requires a 5x5 floor of mystical infuser base blocks and four pillars of four block tall bookshelves in the corners.

## Mystical devourer
A specialized block dispenser capable of all special abilities golden tools have on top of a new ability to produce engraved obsidian.

## Diamond drill
A drill for breaking obsidian into smaller chunks, needed for chiseled obsidian and can be used to craft other obsidian blocks more efficiently.

## Reinforced mill stone and reinforced saw
Specializations of the BTW machines which can not craft the regular recipes but can produce new components otherwise not possible.

# Installation
It is recommended to use Prism Launcher to install this mod. All dependencies are available on Modrinth as well. It is important to use Java 17 to run the mod. This mod is an add-on of Better Than Wolves Legacy Unofficial which can be seen in the dependencies. A Babric instance is needed to install the mod which can be found [here](https://github.com/Glass-Series/babric-prism-instance).

# Licensing information
The mod is licensed under the same license as Better Than Wolves due to its heavy usage of BTW code and assets. Credit goes to FlowerChild for creating the original version of BTW and its code and assets. Distributing and modifying this mod is allowed if appropriate credit is given.
